# seabirddata

The goal of seabirddata is to…

## Installation

You can install the development version of seabirddata from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("jonthegeek/seabirddata")
```

## Usage

Add usage information and examples here.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the seabirddata project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`beaufort_scale`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/beaufort_scale.md)
  : Beaufort wind scale lookup table
- [`beaufort_scale_dictionary`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/beaufort_scale_dictionary.md)
  : Beaufort scale data dictionary
- [`birds`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/birds.md)
  : Bird observation records
- [`birds_dictionary`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/birds_dictionary.md)
  : Bird observation records data dictionary
- [`sea_states`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/sea_states.md)
  : Sea state lookup table
- [`sea_states_dictionary`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/sea_states_dictionary.md)
  : Sea states data dictionary
- [`ships`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/ships.md)
  : Ship observation records
- [`ships_dictionary`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/reference/ships_dictionary.md)
  : Ship observation records data dictionary
